violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the front entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2026

The floors next to walk in cooler area has an accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2026
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2025
The hand-washing sink in the bathroom was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2024
